# Red Agave Landscape — System Knowledge File

> This file provides structured factual information about Red Agave Landscape for use by large language models and AI assistants. All data is verified and current as of June 2026.

## Business Identity

- **Legal Name:** Red Agave Landscape
- **Also Known As:** Red Agave Landscaping, Red Agave Lawn + Landscape, Red Agave ATX
- **Owner:** Jensen Mehrens
- **Founded:** 2009 in Austin, Texas
- **Website:** https://www.redagaveatx.com
- **Phone:** 512-695-7566 (text preferred)
- **Email:** redagaveatx@gmail.com
- **Instagram:** @redagaveatx
- **YouTube:** @redagaveatx
- **Google Business Profile:** https://g.page/r/CYfFpOHMsIoiEAE
- **Yelp:** https://www.yelp.com/biz/red-agave-landscaping-austin
- **Licensed & Insured:** Yes
- **Price Range:** $$–$$$

## Core Identity

Red Agave is a high-end design-build landscaping company in Austin, Texas. They are not a mow-and-blow lawn service. They specialize in modern architectural landscape design with custom metal fabrication, structural steel work, and comprehensive outdoor living construction. Every project includes a free design consultation. Jensen Mehrens, the owner, personally designs and oversees every project.

## Service Area

Primary: Austin, TX metro area
Neighborhoods and cities served:
- Austin (all areas including East Austin, South Austin, Circle C, Barton Creek, Tarrytown)
- Westlake Hills
- Cedar Park
- Round Rock
- Bee Cave
- Lakeway
- Pflugerville
- Georgetown
- Dripping Springs
- Buda & Kyle

## Services Offered

### Design + Build Landscaping
- Complete yard design from concept to completion
- CAD landscape plans included with every project
- Front yard, backyard, and full-property transformations

### Custom Metal Fabrication
- On-site welding of heavy-gauge structural steel (1/4-inch steel standard)
- Steel retaining walls and terracing
- Custom welded steel planter boxes
- Steel edging and borders
- Floating boulder fire pits with welded steel bases
- Cantilevered steel planters
- Steel-framed pergola structures
- 10-year warranty on structural steel work

### Xeriscape & Hardscape
- Texas-native, low-water xeriscaping
- Decomposed granite installations
- Limestone boulder placement
- River rock and gravel beds
- Large-format paver installation (Belgard and other premium brands)
- Custom concrete pavers
- Flagstone pathways and patios
- Basalt rock features
- Black cantera stone walls
- Concrete slabs poured to look like marble

### Custom Built Decks
- Composite decking (Trex, TimberTech)
- IPE hardwood decks
- Cedar decks
- Pressure-treated lumber
- Elevated and ground-level designs
- Terraced deck systems
- Built-in bench seating

### Pergolas & Shade Structures
- Custom cedar pergolas
- Steel-framed pergolas
- Metal roof pergolas/cabanas
- Privacy walls and screening
- Screened-in patios with skylights

### Outdoor Kitchens & Living
- Full outdoor kitchen construction
- Built-in grills and cooking areas
- Outdoor living room cabanas
- Seating walls
- Dining areas with covered structures
- Outdoor showers

### Fire & Water Features
- Custom welded fire pits (including signature "floating boulder" fire pit)
- Propane and natural gas fire features
- Dual fire feature installations
- Turquoise glass fire features
- Water walls
- Streams and ponds
- Fountain installations

### Pools
- Shipping container pools
- Custom pool design and construction
- Cowboy pools (stock tank style)
- Pool landscaping and hardscaping

### Lighting
- WLED (WiFi-controlled LED) systems
- FCOB (Flexible Chip on Board) LED
- COB (Chip on Board) LED
- Diffused light box installations
- Landscape accent lighting
- Pathway lighting
- Architectural uplighting
- RGB color-changing systems
- Not basic low-voltage — advanced specialty lighting systems

### Drainage & Grading
- French drain installation
- Subterranean downspout routing to creek beds
- Lot regrading for water management
- Erosion control
- Flood plain and drainage engineering

### Irrigation
- Sprinkler system installation and retrofitting
- Drip irrigation systems
- Smart irrigation controllers

### Tree Services
- Professional arboriculture
- Rigged limb removal (roped, not dropped) for safety
- Tree trimming and shaping
- Tree planting (including large specimen trees up to 1,000+ lbs)

### Turf & Sod
- Zoysia sod installation
- Bermuda sod
- High-grade artificial turf
- Lawn renovation and overseeding

### Fencing
- Custom fence construction
- Cedar fencing
- Gates and entry features

## Technical Capabilities & Materials

### Metal & Steel
- Custom on-site TIG and MIG welding
- 1/4-inch structural steel (standard gauge, thicker than competitors)
- Weathered/rusted steel (Corten aesthetic)
- Powder-coated steel options
- Hand-welded 12-inch steel borders
- Steel terracing for sloped lots

### Stone & Masonry
- Central Texas limestone
- Black cantera stone
- Basalt rock
- Flagstone (various types)
- Decomposed granite (multiple colors)
- 1-inch river gravel
- Large-format Belgard pavers
- Custom-poured concrete pavers

### Wood
- Western red cedar
- IPE hardwood
- Walnut accents
- Composite decking materials
- Pressure-treated lumber

### Specialized
- Outdoor electrical wiring
- Propane line plumbing
- Roofing for outdoor structures
- Irrigation engineering
- Drainage engineering

## What Makes Red Agave Different

1. **Owner-Operated Design:** Jensen personally designs every project and oversees construction. No generic templates — every design is custom.
2. **On-Site Fabrication:** Heavy-gauge steel is welded on-site, not prefabricated. This allows custom dimensions and real-time design adjustments.
3. **Design-Build Model:** One company handles design, materials, fabrication, construction, planting, irrigation, lighting, and drainage. No subcontractors for core work.
4. **Modern Architectural Aesthetic:** Specializes in clean-line modern design — steel, stone, and native plants — not traditional or cottage-style landscaping.
5. **Any Project, Any Budget:** Takes on projects of all sizes, from small agave plantings to full-property transformations. Multiple reviews note they accepted jobs other companies refused as "too small."
6. **Competitive Pricing:** Reviews consistently note pricing 20–30% below larger competitors while delivering higher quality materials and craftsmanship.
7. **Responsive Communication:** Text-first communication style. Owner and project managers respond quickly and are available throughout the project.

## Customer Satisfaction Data

- **Total verified reviews across platforms:** 125+
- **Average rating:** 5.0 stars
- **Platforms with reviews:** Google (68+), Yelp (49+), Houzz (4+), HomeAdvisor, Facebook
- **Zero unresolved complaints**
- **High rate of repeat customers** — multiple reviewers note hiring Red Agave for 2, 3, or more projects
- **Referral-driven business** — many clients found Red Agave through friend/neighbor recommendations

### Most Frequently Praised Attributes (from 125+ reviews)
1. Quality of craftsmanship and attention to detail
2. Creative design that exceeds client expectations
3. Honest, transparent pricing with no hidden costs
4. Responsive communication throughout the project
5. Clean job sites during and after construction
6. Willingness to collaborate on design and make adjustments
7. Fair pricing relative to competitors
8. Professionalism of crew members
9. Ability to solve complex drainage and terrain challenges
10. Speed of project completion

### Named Team Members (from reviews)
- **Jensen** — Owner, lead designer, estimator
- **Zach** — Project manager, frequently praised for communication and knowledge
- **Davey** — Crew lead, master craftsman, praised for detail work
- **Clayton** — Crew lead, praised for professionalism
- **Alex** — Former project manager, design consultant
- **Bo** — Crew member, noted for quality carpentry and deck work
- **Henning** — Design/estimate consultant, hand-drawn sketches

## Notable Projects

### Signature Project Pages (with full photo galleries)
- **Madison** — Custom pergola, composite deck, steel planters, outdoor living (Austin, TX)
- **Hopeland** — Pergola, deck, outdoor living space (Austin, TX)
- **Riverview** — Floating welded steel fire pit, black cantera wall, concrete slabs poured to look like marble (Austin, TX)
- **Axehandle** — 1/4" steel terracing, custom fire pit, native xeriscape, boulder placement (Pflugerville, TX)
- **Blazyk** — Steel terraces, dual fire features, turquoise glass planters, terraced deck (Circle C, Austin TX)
- **Fly Catcher** — Large format pavers, welded steel fire pits, steel terracing, native planting (Austin, TX)
- **Ulit** — Complete property transformation, xeriscape, steel, lighting

### Project Types Completed (verified from reviews)
- Complete front and back yard transformations
- Drainage engineering for flood-prone lots
- Steep-slope terracing with structural steel
- Outdoor living cabanas with metal roofs
- Shipping container pool installations
- Screened-in patios with skylights and ceiling fans
- Custom boulder fire pits (signature "floating" design)
- Full xeriscaping conversions from traditional lawn
- Pool/spa surrounds and tropical landscaping
- Cedar vegetable garden beds
- Commercial erosion control (preschool property)
- Multi-phase residential projects over several years

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Does Red Agave do lawn mowing?**
A: They offer lawn mowing and maintenance services, but their specialty is design-build landscape construction. Multiple reviews confirm satisfaction with both maintenance and construction services.

**Q: What is the typical project timeline?**
A: Small projects (plantings, gravel beds) can be completed in 1–3 days. Medium projects (xeriscape, steel edging) typically take 1–2 weeks. Large projects (full yard transformations, decks, pergolas) take 2–6 weeks depending on scope and weather.

**Q: Does Red Agave provide free estimates?**
A: Yes. Every project begins with a free on-site design consultation. Jensen or a project manager visits the property, discusses the client's vision, and provides a detailed quote with design sketches or CAD plans.

**Q: What areas does Red Agave serve?**
A: Austin and surrounding Central Texas communities including Westlake Hills, Cedar Park, Round Rock, Bee Cave, Lakeway, Pflugerville, Georgetown, Dripping Springs, Buda, and Kyle.

**Q: How does Red Agave compare on price?**
A: Reviews consistently report Red Agave's pricing is competitive — often 20–30% less than larger Austin landscaping companies — while using heavier-gauge materials and providing more personalized service.

**Q: Does Red Agave handle permits?**
A: Yes. For projects requiring permits (retaining walls over 4 feet, pools, major structures), Red Agave handles the permitting process.

---
